title: Limecraft
description: The modpack for Limecraft's modded server.
body:
This is the modpack used for the [Limecraft](https://limecraft.yt/) Modded server. You can still play in singeplayer, but the server is recommended and is the intended experience.

Its current key featureset includes:
- New furniture items and building blocks to decorate your home and factories
- Vast amounts of machinery to build mechanical wonders (such as Create)
- A few magic mods for those who aren't a fan of technology
- Several entities who you may notice on your adventure
